title: Phase 12D: Exception center and daily close
description: Build the global exception center page (centralized queue with priority, owner, SLA, resolution tracking) and daily close system (service and UI page for end-of-day reconciliation).
steps: Create src/app/(dashboard)/exceptions/page.tsx with global exception center
Implement centralized queue: filter by category, severity, owner, SLA status, module
Display exception cards with priority, owner assignment, SLA countdown, resolution workflow
Create src/lib/services/daily-close.service.ts with daily close orchestration
Implement daily close checks: all routes complete, all COD reconciled, all exceptions addressed, inventory counts balanced
Create src/app/(dashboard)/daily-close/page.tsx with daily close page
Display checklist of close items with pass/fail status, blockers, and override capability
